facebook.caption:
4.9 stars. 578 reviews. On Phu Quoc's longest beach strip.

WorldHotels Long Beach Resort Phú Quốc sits right on Tran Hung Dao Street, the island's most walkable hotel corridor. Restaurants, bars, and the beach all within minutes on foot.

578 people rated this nearly perfect. That's not luck. That's consistency.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
